data.biography: 出生於美國佐治亞州的阿森斯鎮。她的家族血統複雜，在她身上有著瑞典、德國和北美徹羅基人的血液。她的家庭共有六個姐妹，因此她並未得到父母過多的愛。但家庭的生活卻使她早熟並學習自理生活，她從父親那裏繼承了音樂天賦，學會演奏鋼琴和吉它，還是一位出色的鼓手，同時顯露出非凡的舞蹈才能。16 歲參加地方選美被模特星探發掘，繼而離鄉到紐約發展，卻發現自己略顯內向的性格與社會脱節；70 年代初她已成為國際頂尖模特，當過無數雜誌的封面女郎，所拍的洗髮水廣告膾炙人口；從小暗暗鍾情於表演的她捨棄掉不少掙錢機會，參加訓練班潛心學習表演，參演過當年大熱的電視劇，直到 1983 年為《花花公子》拍照使知名度飆升，得以在 007 系列影片中與肖恩·康納利合作，當了一回邦女郎後，她從 T 型台寵兒到大銀幕明星的轉型心願方得以達成。她的代表作應該算是 1986 年在票房和題材兩方面都驚世駭俗的《愛你九周半》。這部描寫情慾的影片沒有任何格調低下的鏡頭，精彩的對白，精妙的細節，精美的畫面和男女主角精湛的演技，使其在世界電影史上留下了令人矚目的一筆。女主角戲裏戲外的憂鬱氣質融為一體，激情與哀婉的兩極之間，一笑傾人城。1989 年，這位如日中天的美人又攜再破票房紀錄的《蝙蝠俠》亮相。她的顛峰之作是 1997 年的奧斯卡大贏家《幕後嫌疑犯》，這是她在沉寂了幾年之後東山再起之作。2002 年她演出的《8 英裏》十分叫好，2004 年，她又推出了電影《寡居的一年》（The Door in the Floor）和《駁命來電》。近兩年出演的影片有《賭博》、《一級戒備》、《燃燒的平原》、《線人》等。
data.name: 金·碧辛嘉

data.biography: Kimila Ann Basinger (ur. 8 grudnia 1953) jest amerykańską aktorką i byłą modelką. Zdobyła uznanie za swoją pracę w filmie i telewizji, za którą otrzymała wiele wyróżnień, w tym Oscara, Złoty Glob, nagrodę Gildii Aktorów Ekranowych i gwiazdę w Hollywoodzkiej Alei Gwiazd. Po krótkiej, ale udanej karierze modelki w Nowym Jorku, Basinger przeprowadziła się do Los Angeles, gdzie w 1976 roku zaczęła grać w telewizji. Wystąpiła w kilku filmach telewizyjnych, w tym w remake'u Stąd do wieczności (1979), zanim zadebiutowała w dramacie Hard Country (1981). Okrzyknięta symbolem seksu lat 80. i 90., Basinger zyskała rozgłos dzięki roli dziewczyny Bonda, Domino Petachi w Nigdy nie mów nigdy (1983). Otrzymała nominację do Złotego Globu za rolę w The Natural (1984), zagrała w dramacie erotycznym 9½ Weeks (1986) i zagrała Vicki Vale w Batmanie Tima Burtona (1989), który pozostaje najbardziej dochodowym filmem w jej karierze. Za rolę femme fatale w L.A. Confidential (1997) Basinger zdobyła Oscara dla najlepszej aktorki drugoplanowej. Jej inne filmy to No Mercy (1986), Blind Date (1987), My Stepmother Is an Alien (1988), Cool World (1992), The Real McCoy (1993), I Dreamed of Africa (2000), 8 Mile (2002), The Door in the Floor (2004), Cellular (2004), The Sentinel (2006), The Burning Plain (2009), Grudge Match (2013) i Fifty Shades Darker (2017). Rozwiedziona z makijażystą Ronem Snyderem i aktorem Alecem Baldwinem, Basinger mieszka ze swoim wieloletnim fryzjerem, Mitchem Stone'em. Miała głośny związek między małżeństwami z nieżyjącym muzykiem Prince'em, z którym nagrała album Hollywood Affair, i jest matką influencerki mediów społecznościowych Ireland Baldwin z jej małżeństwa z Alecem.

Kim Basinger je jednou ze šesti dcer džezového hudebníka a herečky. Když jí bylo 17, zvítězila v Georgii v soutěži krásy. Zvedlo jí to sebevědomí a vyrazila do New Yorku. Dělala manekýnu a zkoušela hrát. Přestože měla výraznou tvář, dokonalou postavu a zlaté vlasy, zdálo se, že zůstane jednou z tisíců půvabným blondýnek toužících po slávě.

Bylo jí už 30, když tak trochu ze zoufalství zapózovala pro Playboy. Tam si jí všimli producenti a režiséři. Jenže se tím dostala do škatulky nepříliš cudných krasavic.

Dostala roli v bondovce Nikdy neříkej nikdy a v 9 a ½ týdne. Původně se roli zdráhala přijmout. Na svou dobu šlo o skandální erotický film. Kim hrála sexuální otrokyni, zcela podvolenou lehce perverzním nápadům svého přítele. Konečně se stala slavnou. Tak slavnou, až to nezvládla.

Začala pít a brát drogy. Z krize se nakonec dostala. Vdala se za herce Aleca Baldwina a spolu si i několikrát zahráli. Zdálo se však, že její sláva nenávratně mizí, výrazné role nedostávala. Zlom přišel v roce 1997 s vynikající kriminálkou L.A.-Přísně tajné . Film dostal dva Oscary a jednoho z nich právě Kim Basinger. Ukázala, že není jen svlékající se krasavice. A tak jí ani nevadilo, že přišla o své dlouhé vlasy. Scénář jí totiž předepsal, že bude platinovou blondýnou. Její medovou hřívu odbarvovali tak pořádně, až jí vlasy upadly a musela se ostříhat nakrátko.

Ani do L.A.-Přísně tajné tajné se jí moc nechtělo. Měla dvouletou dceru a myslela, že už bude mámou v domácnosti. Udělala dobře, manželství s Baldwinem stejně zkrachovalo a dodnes se spolu soudí o dceru, která zatím vždy zůstala v péči matky.

Po senzaci v podobě Oscara však také nějaké výraznější nabídky a role nepřicházely. Až v roce 2004 se na ní opět usmálo štěstí – přijala hlavní roli ve filmu Dveře v podlaze podle románu Johna Irvinga . A zde po boku Jeffa Bridgese podala strhující výkon, který by alespoň zasloužil nominaci na Oscara. A od této doby se nabídky jen hrnuly: objevila se v zajímavém televizním dramatu The Mermaid Chair (2006), 1. dámu USA si zahrála vedle Michaela Douglese a Kiefera Sutherlanda v thrilleru Strážce (2006) nebo v dramatu Hazard (2006), kde s přehledem zvládla roli spisovatelky závislé na hazardních hrách.

V září roku 2007 natočila thriller While She Was Out. Na konci roku 2008 objevila v hlavní roli v thrilleru The Infomers, kde se opět sešla s Mickeym Rourkem. Matku Charlize Theron ztvárnila v dramatu The Burning Plain. Roku 2017 si zahrála ve filmu Padesát odstínů temnoty a následující rok v pokračování Padesát odstínů svobody.

Kimila Ann Basinger, 8 Aralık 1953 tarihinde Athens, Georgia'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Caz müzisyeni bir baba ve model, oyuncu ve yüzücü olan bir annenin kızı olan Basinger, İngiliz, Alman, İsveç ve İskoç kökenlidir. Çocukluğunda aşırı utangaç biri olmasına rağmen, lise yıllarında bu durumu yenerek Genç Güzellik Yarışmalarına katıldı. Kısa sürede New York'a taşınarak Ford Modellik Ajansı ile sözleşme imzaladı ve 1970'lerin başında "Breck Kızı" olarak tanınan başarılı bir top model oldu. Ancak modellikten tatmin olmayan Basinger, oyunculuk kariyeri için 1976'da Los Angeles'a taşındı. Televizyon dizilerindeki konuk oyunculukların ardından "From Here to Eternity" (1979) dizisindeki Lorene Rogers rolüyle dikkatleri üzerine çekti.

Sinema dünyasındaki ilk büyük çıkışını, Sean Connery'nin son kez James Bond olarak döndüğü "Asla Asla Deme" (Never Say Never Again) (1983) filmindeki Bond kızı Domino Petachi rolüyle yaptı. Hemen ardından Robert Redford ile başrolü paylaştığı "Doğal Yetenek" (The Natural) (1984) filmindeki performansı ona En İyi Yardımcı Kadın Oyuncu dalında Altın Küre adaylığı getirdi. Ancak Basinger'ı dünya çapında bir ikon ve dönemin en büyük seks sembollerinden biri haline getiren yapım, Mickey Rourke ile başrolü paylaştığı erotik drama "9½ Hafta" (9½ Weeks) (1986) oldu. Bu filmin yarattığı sansasyonun ardından, Tim Burton'ın yönettiği ve gişe rekorları kıran "Batman" (1989) filminde fotoğrafçı Vicki Vale karakterini canlandırarak kariyerinin ticari zirvesine ulaştı.

1990'ların başında yaşadığı finansal krizler ve çalkantılı özel hayatıyla gündeme gelse de, Curtis Hanson'ın yönettiği neo-noir başyapıtı "L.A. Confidential" (1997) ile kariyerinde muhteşem bir dönüş yaptı. Bu filmde canlandırdığı "femme fatale" Lynn Bracken rolü, eleştirmenlerden tam not aldı ve ona En İyi Yardımcı Kadın Oyuncu dalında Oscar (Akademi Ödülü) ve Altın Küre kazandırdı. Bu başarı, onun sadece bir güzellik ikonu olmadığını, aynı zamanda derinlikli bir karakter oyuncusu olduğunu kanıtladı.

2000'li yıllarda Eminem'in hayatından esinlenen "8 Mil" (8 Mile) (2002) filminde sorunlu anneyi canlandırarak yeni nesil izleyicilerin de beğenisini kazandı. "Hücresel" (Cellular) (2004) ve "The Door in the Floor" (2004) gibi yapımlarda dramatik yeteneklerini sergilemeye devam etti. Daha yakın dönemde ise "Karanlığın Elli Tonu" (Fifty Shades Darker) (2017) ve serinin devam filminde Elena Lincoln karakteriyle izleyici karşısına çıktı. Oyunculuğunun yanı sıra tutkulu bir hayvan hakları savunucusu olan Basinger, uzun yıllardır PETA ile aktif çalışmalar yürütmektedir.

Loredana Bertè (Bagnara, 20 de septiembre de 1950) es una cantante italiana. Es la hermana menor de Mia Martini, con la que curiosamente comparte el día y mes de nacimiento, y es considerada por muchos una de las más importantes cantantes italianas.

Loredana Bertè (née le 20 septembre 1950 à Bagnara Calabra, dans la province de Reggio de Calabre, en Calabre) est une chanteuse italienne.

Loredana Bertè naît le 20 septembre 1950 à Bagnara Calabra, trois ans après sa sœur la chanteuse Mia Martini (morte le 12 mai 1995).

Son père, Giuseppe Radames Bertè, et sa mère Maria Salvina Dato, sont professeurs à l’école supérieure. Sa famille est constituée de: Leda (1er janvier 1946), Domenica (20 septembre 1947), Loredana (20 septembre 1950) et Olivia (28 janvier 1958).

Après avoir passé son enfance à Porto Recanati, dans la région italienne des Marches, elle déménage à Rome en 1963, après le divorce de ses parents, avec sa mère et ses sœurs. Elle commence sa carrière comme danseuse dans un établissement typiquement romain, le Piper club.

Dans les années 1970, Loredana Bertè gagne en popularité et dans les années 1980 elle enchaîne les succès.

De 1989 à 1992, elle est mariée au champion de tennis suédois Björn Borg. Après s'être séparée de Björn Borg, Loredana Bertè retourne en Italie, et sa carrière prend un nouveau tournant. Elle devient l'auteur de ses nouvelles chansons, dans lesquelles elle exprime amertume et désillusion.

En 1995, la mort de sa sœur, Mia Martini, marquera profondément son existence.

En 2002, elle participe avec grand succès au festival de Sanremo avec Dimmi che mi ami. En 2004, elle participe à Musicfarm et en 2005 produit Babybertè.

En 2019, elle participe à nouveau au festival de Sanremo, avec Cosa ti aspetti da me. Elle finira 4ème, aux portes de la super-finale. L'annonce de son résultat causera des huées dans le public, étant très appréciée des spectateurs.

Loredana Bertè (born 20 September 1950) is an Italian singer and actress. In her long career she has worked with prominent Italian songwriters such as Pino Daniele, Ivano Fossati, Mario Lavezzi, Mango and Enrico Ruggeri, among others; her sister Mia Martini was also an acclaimed singer. She has experimented with different genres, from rock to reggae, from funk to pop. Bertè is known for the eccentric clothing she wears onstage for her performances.

At one point in her life (1988–1992), she was married to the tennis star Björn Borg.

Bertè was born in Bagnara Calabra, Province of Reggio Calabria, in Southern Italy on September 20 as the third of four daughters, three years after her sister Domenica. Her parents, Giuseppe Radames Bertè and Maria Salvina Dato, were both school teachers. Loredana spent her childhood in Porto Recanati and then in Ancona. After her parents separated, Bertè moved with her mother to Rome where she attended the local Art Institute.

In the early 1970s she performed as a go-go dancer in television and radio shows such as "Bandiera Gialla" and "Stasera Rita!". She later joined the dance troupe of the Piper Club in Rome, where she met Renato Zero. In 1969 both Bertè, Zero and Teo Teocoli starred in the Italian edition of the musical "Hair". In 1970 Loredana and her sister Domenica, who had by then changed her name to Mia Martini, performed as backing vocalists for Chico Buarque de Holanda. While Martini would consequently start a successful music career, recording songs like "Piccolo Uomo" and "Minuetto", Loredana continued to pursue theatre. In 1972 she performed in "Ciao Rudy" and "Orfeo 9". In 1974, producers Alfredo Cerruti and Enrico Riccardi persuaded Loredana to record her first album, Streaking. Bertè's second album, "Normale o Super" included "Sei Bellissima", Bertè's first domestic hit. In 1978, Bertè started a relationship with Ivano Fossati. Fossati produced the single "E la luna bussò", which is considered one of the early minstream reggae songs in Italy.

In the early 1980s Bertè spent a year in New York to work on her next album. Elio Fiorucci introduced her to Andy Warhol at the Factory. Warhol and Bertè collaborated on the music video for her song "Movie". In 1982 she won Festivalbar with "Non sono una signora". In 1985 she recorded the album Carioca in collaboration with Djavan. In 1986 she participated to the Sanremo Music Festival with the song "Re". In 1988 she met and married Björn Borg. The marriage would end in 1992. In 1993 Bertè and Mia Martini, collaborated on the song "Stiamo come stiamo". On May 12, 1995, Martini was found unresponsive in her apartment in Cardano al Campo (varese). Martini's death proved to be a devastating moment in Bertè's life.

In the early 2000s Loredana returned to theatre, performing with Carla Fracci in "Gerusalemme" at the Baths of Caracalla in Rome. She entrusts the direction of the three video clips that are part of the mini-CD "Dimmi che mi ami" of 2002. Two years later she took part in "Music Farm", the first reality show on Italian TV involving famous singers. Thanks to the show's proceeds, she produced the new album "Babybertè" (2005) by herself. ...

Source: Article "Loredana Bertè" from Wikipedia in English, licensed under CC-BY-SA 3.0.

Marthino Lio (born in Surabaya, East Java, Indonesia, on January 26, 1989) is an Indonesian actor, singer, and model. He gained widespread recognition for his role as Raden Mas Rangsang in the film Sultan Agung: Tahta, Perjuangan dan Cinta.

Marthino began his career in the entertainment industry by becoming the runner-up in the cover boy search for Aneka Yess! magazine in 2004. The following year, in 2005, he was crowned the winner of the Putra Putri Bahari pageant and earned the title of Putra Bahari.

In 2016, Marthino ventured into the music industry. He sang the theme song for the film Ada Apa Dengan Cinta? 2, titled "Ratusan Purnama", alongside Melly Goeslaw. The song was written by Melly Goeslaw and Anto Hoed.
data.name: Marthino Lio

Davina Tesalonika Karamoy (born on August 17, 2002, in Jakarta, Indonesia) is an Indonesian actress. She comes from a Minahasan (Manado) family on her father's side and is the third of five siblings.

Davina began gaining attention after starring in various popular soap operas and web series. One of her notable roles was in the series My Nerd Girl (2022), where she acted alongside Naura Ayu. She has also appeared in several other titles, such as Mozachiko (2023) and Antares (2021).

She became widely recognized after playing Nelly in the web series 7 Hari Sebelum 17 Tahun (2021). In addition to acting in films and television, she also has a talent for music.

With her distinctive look and growing acting skills, Davina Karamoy continues to establish herself as one of the most promising young actresses in the Indonesian entertainment industry.

data.biography:
Born in London and raised across London, Spain, and Nigeria, Fagbenle was a world traveler at a young age. As a child, music was his passion and he played the saxophone in bands across Europe, performing at the Edinburgh Festival, Wembley Arena, the Royal Albert Hall, and even touring Spain. When he was 16 years old, Fagbenle landed his first proper role in a Nigerian adaptation of the William Shakespeare play Macbeth. Originally hired to play the saxophone, Fagbenle was also given several lines in the play, and he knew at that moment that acting was his calling. The director was so impressed by Fagbenle's work, by the second revival of the play he had secured the lead role. Fagbenle went on to attend the prestigious Royal Academy of Dramatic Arts, graduating early in 2001 and joining alumni such as Sean Bean, Ralph Fiennes, and Anthony Hopkins. Theatre became his passion, as he appeared in dozens of plays across the UK, working in notable productions including the national tours of shows such as Ragamuffin, Romeo & Juliet [as Mercutio], and the West End debut of Porgy and Bess, the musical. Fagbenle was soon offered his first lead role for the stage, in John Guare's award winning play Six Degrees of Separation. His work was met by outstanding reviews, and a M.E.N. Theatre Award for Best Actor in a Leading Role. While Fagbenle's career flourished on the theatre front, he also made his break into film and television.

In 2006, Fagbenle made his feature film debut, appearing in The Weinstein Company's Breaking and Entering (2006) opposite Jude Law, Robin Wright, and Juliette Binoche. He was next seen in I Could Never Be Your Woman (2007) in 2007 alongside Michelle Pfeiffer, Paul Rudd, and Saoirse Ronan. In 2008, he made his first appearance on US television, starring on NBC's Quarterlife (2007) playing John, a singer songwriter-- where Fagbenle was able pen and perform all the songs his character played on the show. 2008 also brought starring roles for Fagbenle in the UK; as he appeared in the critically acclaimed Walter's War (2008) as Walter Tull, a biopic of the first mixed heritage officer in the British Army, and Consuming Passion (2008) for the BBC. In 2010, Fagbenle took a leading role as Chris in the BBC One flagship show Material Girl (2010). He also starred in the television series Thorne: Sleepyhead (2010) and Thorne: Scaredycat (2010), adaptations of the Mark Billingham novels Sleepyhead and Scaredy Cat. Directed by 24 (2001) producer Stephen Hopkins, the six one hour episodes also starred Sandra Oh, and David Morrissey, and was sold to over 100 countries. 2010 also brought Fagbenle back to the states, where he starred opposite Tia and Tamera Mowry in the Lifetime movie Double Wedding (2010).

In his down time, Fagbenle loves to go backpacking, play basketball, and volunteers at numerous schools, putting on free drama and music classes for kids.
data.name: O-T Fagbenle

data.biography:
Fagbenle出生于伦敦，在伦敦、西班牙和尼日利亚长大，从小就是一个世界旅行者。小时候，音乐是他的爱好，他在欧洲各地的乐队中演奏萨克斯管，在爱丁堡音乐节、温布利球场、皇家阿尔伯特音乐厅演出，甚至在西班牙巡回演出。16岁时，法格本勒在尼日利亚改编自威廉·莎士比亚戏剧《麦克白》的电影中扮演了他的第一个正式角色。最初受雇演奏萨克斯管的法格本勒在剧中也被赋予了几句台词，那一刻他就知道表演是他的使命。导演对法格本勒的作品印象深刻，在戏剧的第二次复兴中，他获得了主角。Fagbenle 继续就读于著名的皇家戏剧艺术学院，于 2001 年初毕业，并加入了 Sean Bean、Ralph Fiennes 和 Anthony Hopkins 等校友的行列。戏剧成为他的激情所在，因为他出现在英国各地的数十部戏剧中，参与了著名的作品，包括《拉加玛芬》、《罗密欧与朱丽叶》等演出的全国巡回演出，以及音乐剧《波吉和贝丝》在伦敦西区的首演。Fagbenle很快在约翰·瓜尔（John Guare）的获奖戏剧《六度分离》（Six Degrees of Separation）中获得了他的第一个舞台主角。他的作品获得了出色的评价，并获得了 M.E.N. 戏剧奖最佳男主角奖。虽然法格本勒的职业生涯在戏剧方面蓬勃发展，但他也进入了电影和电视领域。

2006 年，Fagbenle 首次亮相剧情片，出现在韦恩斯坦公司的 Breaking and Entering （2006） 中，与裘德·洛、罗宾·赖特和朱丽叶·比诺什演对手戏。2007 年，他与米歇尔·菲佛、保罗·路德和西尔莎·罗南一起出现在《我永远不会成为你的女人》（2007 年）中。2008 年，他首次出现在美国电视上，在 NBC 的 Quarterlife （2007） 中饰演歌手词曲作者约翰——Fagbenle 能够笔下并表演他的角色在节目中播放的所有歌曲。2008年，他还在英国为Fagbenle带来了主演角色;他在广受好评的《沃尔特的战争》（2008 年）中饰演沃尔特·图尔（Walter Tull），这是一部英国陆军第一位混血军官的传记片，以及 BBC 的《消耗激情》（2008 年）。2010 年，Fagbenle 在 BBC One 旗舰节目 Material Girl （2010） 中饰演 Chris。他还出演了电视连续剧《索恩：瞌睡头》（2010 年）和《索恩：吓人猫》（2010 年），改编自马克·比林汉姆的小说《睡头猫》和《吓人猫》。由24（2001）制片人斯蒂芬·霍普金斯（Stephen Hopkins）执导，六集一小时的剧集还由桑德拉·吴（Sandra Oh）和大卫·莫里西（David Morrissey）主演，并销往100多个国家。2010 年还将 Fagbenle 带回美国，在那里他在终身电影《双重婚礼》（2010 年）中与 Tia 和 Tamera Mowry 演对手戏。

闲暇时，Fagbenle 喜欢背包旅行、打篮球，并在许多学校做志愿者，为孩子们提供免费的戏剧和音乐课程。

data.biography:
Fagbenle 出生於倫敦，在倫敦、西班牙和奈及利亞長大，從小就是一個世界旅行者。小時候，音樂是他的愛好，他在歐洲各地的樂隊中演奏薩克斯管，在愛丁堡音樂節、温布利球場、皇家阿爾伯特音樂廳演出，甚至在西班牙巡迴演出。16 歲時，法格本勒在奈及利亞改編自威廉·莎士比亞戲劇《馬克白》的電影中扮演了他的第一個正式角色。最初受僱演奏薩克斯管的法格本勒在劇中也被賦豫了幾句台詞，那一刻他就知道表演是他的使命。導演對法格本勒的作品印象深刻，在戲劇的第二次復興中，他獲得了主角。Fagbenle 繼續就讀於著名的皇家戲劇藝術學院，於 2001 年初畢業，並加入了 Sean Bean、Ralph Fiennes 和 Anthony Hopkins 等校友的行列。戲劇成為他的激情所在，因為他出現在英國各地的數十部戲劇中，參與了著名的作品，包括《拉加瑪芬》、《羅密歐與茱麗葉之後現代激情篇》等演出的全國巡迴演出，以及音樂劇《波吉和貝絲》在倫敦西區的首演。Fagbenle 很快在約翰·瓜爾（John Guare）的獲獎戲劇《六度分離》（Six Degrees of Separation）中獲得了他的第一個舞台主角。他的作品獲得了出色的評價，並獲得了 M.E. N. 戲劇獎最佳男主角獎。雖然法格本勒的職業生涯在戲劇方面蓬勃發展，但他也進入了電影和電視領域。

2006 年，Fagbenle 首次亮相劇情片，出現在韋恩斯坦公司的 Breaking and Entering （2006） 中，與裘德·洛、羅賓·賴特和朱麗葉·比諾什演對手戲。2007 年，他與米歇爾·菲佛、保羅·路德和西爾莎·羅南一起出現在《我永遠不會成為你的女人》（2007 年）中。2008 年，他首次出現在美國電視上，在 NBC 的 Quarterlife （2007） 中飾演歌手詞曲作者約翰——Fagbenle 能夠筆下並表演他的角色在節目中播放的所有歌曲。2008 年，他還在英國為 Fagbenle 帶來了主演角色; 他在廣受好評的《沃爾特的戰爭》（2008 年）中飾演沃爾特·圖爾（Walter Tull），這是一部英國陸軍第一位混血軍官的傳記片，以及 BBC 的《消耗激情》（2008 年）。2010 年，Fagbenle 在 BBC One 旗艦節目 Material Girl （2010） 中飾演 Chris。他還出演了電視聯續劇《索恩：瞌睡頭》（2010 年）和《索恩：嚇人貓》（2010 年），改編自馬克·比林漢姆的小説《睡頭貓》和《嚇人貓》。由 24（2001）製片人斯蒂芬·霍普金斯（Stephen Hopkins）執導，六集一小時的劇集還由桑德拉·吳（Sandra Oh）和大衞·莫裏西（David Morrissey）主演，並銷往 100 多個國家。2010 年還將 Fagbenle 帶回美國，在那裏他在終身電影《雙重婚禮》（2010 年）中與 Tia 和 Tamera Mowry 演對手戲。

閒暇時，Fagbenle 喜歡揹包旅行、打籃球，並在許多學校做志願者，為孩子們提供免費的戲劇和音樂課程。

Emily Beecham (* 12. Mai 1984 in Wythenshawe, Manchester, Greater Manchester) ist eine britisch-US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.  Emily Beechams Mutter ist US-Amerikanerin aus Arizona und ihr Vater Brite aus Lincolnshire. Aufgrund dessen besitzt sie eine doppelte Staatsbürgerschaft. Sie schloss 2006 ihr Studium an der London Academy of Music and Dramatic Art erfolgreich ab.

Beecham wurde einem größeren Publikum 2007 durch die Rolle der Karen im Endzeit-Horrorfilm 28 Weeks Later bekannt. Beim London Independent Film Festival 2011 war sie in der Kategorie Beste Schauspielerin nominiert.

data.biography:
Jonathan Drew Groff (born March 26, 1985) is an American actor and singer. He began his career on Broadway, rising to prominence for his portrayal of Melchior Gabor in the original production of Spring Awakening (2006-2008), for which he was nominated for the Tony Award for Best Performance by a Leading Actor in a Musical, becoming one of the youngest nominees for the award, at age 21. He returned to Broadway to portray King George III in the original production of Hamilton (2015), for which he earned a nomination for the Tony Award for Best Featured Actor in a Musical. For the original cast album of Hamilton, he, along with the other singers on the recording, won the Grammy Award for Best Musical Theater Album.

Branching out into film and television roles, Groff made his film debut in Ang Lee's Taking Woodstock (2009), and became a recurring guest star in the Fox musical-comedy series Glee (2009–2015) as Jesse St. James. He voiced the roles of Kristoff and Sven in Disney's Frozen franchise, including Frozen (2013) and Frozen II (2019), two of the highest-grossing films of all time, as well as the short films Frozen Fever (2015) and Olaf's Frozen Adventure (2017). Groff starred as Patrick Murray in the HBO comedy-drama series Looking (2014–2015), the network's first TV series centering around the lives of gay men, as well as its subsequent television film, Looking: The Movie (2016), and portrayed FBI Special Agent Holden Ford in the Netflix period crime drama Mindhunter (2017–2019), produced by David Fincher, for which he won a Satellite Award. In 2021, he received a nomination for a Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Supporting Actor in a Limited Anthology Series or Movie for his performance in the Disney+ live stage recording of Hamilton.

Groff starred in the fourth installment of the Matrix franchise—The Matrix Resurrections (2021)—as Smith, replacing Hugo Weaving from the original trilogy. In 2022, he executive produced the HBO documentary film Spring Awakening: Those You've Known, which saw the 15 year reunion of the original cast of the musical, and voiced the lead role of Ollie in the Netflix series Lost Ollie. He stars in M. Night Shyamalan's apocalyptic horror film Knock at the Cabin (2023) and will return to Broadway in fall 2023 in the first revival of Stephen Sondheim's Merrily We Roll Along.
data.name: Jonathan Groff

data.biography: Jonathan Groff amerykański aktor, urodzony w 1985, znany z Mindhunter, Hamilton, Snajper. Luareat nagrody Satelita.

Jonathan Drew Groff (né le 26 mars 1985) est un acteur et chanteur américain. Il a débuté sa carrière à Broadway, où il s'est fait connaître grâce à son interprétation de Melchior Gabor dans la production originale de Spring Awakening (2006-2008), rôle pour lequel il a été nommé au Tony Award du meilleur acteur dans une comédie musicale, devenant ainsi, à 21 ans, l'un des plus jeunes nommés à ce prix. Il est retourné à Broadway pour incarner le roi George III dans la production originale de Hamilton (2015), rôle pour lequel il a été nommé au Tony Award du meilleur second rôle masculin dans une comédie musicale. L'album original de la distribution de Hamilton lui a valu, avec les autres chanteurs de l'album, le Grammy Award du meilleur album de comédie musicale.

S'orientant ensuite vers le cinéma et la télévision, Groff a fait ses débuts au cinéma dans Taking Woodstock (2009) d'Ang Lee, et est devenu un personnage récurrent dans la série musicale comique Glee (2009-2015) de la Fox, dans le rôle de Jesse St. James. Il a prêté sa voix aux personnages de Kristoff et Sven dans la franchise Disney La Reine des Neiges, notamment dans La Reine des Neiges (2013) et La Reine des Neiges 2 (2019), deux des films les plus rentables de tous les temps, ainsi que dans les courts métrages La Reine des Neiges : Une fête givrée (2015) et Olaf, une aventure givrée (2017). Groff a incarné Patrick Murray dans la série comique dramatique Looking (2014-2015) de HBO, la première série de la chaîne centrée sur la vie d'hommes gays, ainsi que dans le téléfilm qui en a été tiré, Looking: The Movie (2016). Il a également interprété l'agent spécial du FBI Holden Ford dans la série policière historique Mindhunter (2017-2019) de Netflix, produite par David Fincher, rôle pour lequel il a reçu un Satellite Award. En 2021, il a été nommé aux Primetime Emmy Awards dans la catégorie Meilleur acteur dans un second rôle dans une mini-série ou un téléfilm pour sa performance dans l'enregistrement live de Hamilton diffusé sur Disney+.

Groff a incarné Smith dans le quatrième volet de la franchise Matrix, Matrix Resurrections (2021), succédant à Hugo Weaving, personnage de la trilogie originale. En 2022, il a produit le documentaire HBO Spring Awakening: Those You've Known, qui a réuni, quinze ans après, la distribution originale de la comédie musicale, et a prêté sa voix au personnage principal, Ollie, dans la série Netflix Lost Ollie. Il est à l'affiche du film d'horreur apocalyptique de M. Night Shyamalan, Knock at the Cabin (2023), et fera son retour à Broadway à l'automne 2023 dans la première reprise de Merrily We Roll Along de Stephen Sondheim.

data.biography: Sami Bouajila (born in Grenoble, France on 12 May 1966) is a French award-winning actor of Tunisian origin. Bouajila's grandfather was a Berber born in Tripoli, Libya and immigrated to Tunisia. Bouajila's father decided to immigrate to France in 1956. Sami was born and grew up in Échirolles, a suburb south of Grenoble. He studied theater.

Enfant, Sami Bouajila découvre le cinéma en compagnie de son père, d'origine tunisienne, et de son frère. Attiré très tôt par le métier d'acteur, il intègre le Conservatoire Régional de Grenoble et le Centre dramatique de Saint-Etienne, avant de jouer sur les planches du Shakespeare, du Marivaux ou du Koltès.

En 1991, Philippe Galland le fait débuter au cinéma en lui confiant le rôle principal de La Thune, celui d'un ado de banlieue débrouillard et ambitieux. On le retrouve ensuite à l'affiche des Histoires d'amour finissent mal... en général, premier opus d'Anne Fontaine en 1993, et des Silences du palais de Moufida Tlatli, mais c'est dans Bye-bye de Karim Dridi en 1995 que le talent du comédien, entre douceur et intensité, éclate véritablement. S'il tente une incursion hollywoodienne avec Couvre-feu (1998), dans lequel il campe un terroriste palestinien traqué par Denzel Washington, l'acteur choisit le plus souvent de tourner avec de jeunes auteurs (Nos vies heureuses).
data.name: Sami Bouajila

data.biography:
Pirapat Watthanasetsiri, conhecido mundialmente como Earth, é um aclamado ator e modelo tailandês sob o selo da GMMTV. Ele é graduado em Artes Cênicas pela Faculdade de Belas Artes da Universidade Srinakharinwirot (SWU), tendo concluído seus estudos em 2018.

Sua estreia na atuação ocorreu em 2016 com uma participação no curta-metragem "Little Big Dream", mas ele ganhou destaque real em produções como "Water Boyy" (2017) e "Kiss Me Again" (2018). O estrelato global definitivo veio com o papel do Capitão Phupha na série "A Tale of Thousand Stars" (2021), onde iniciou sua parceria de grande sucesso com Mix Sahaphap. Além da atuação, Earth é um empreendedor bem-sucedido, proprietário da rede de casas de massagem NIKKO THAI MASSAGE. Conhecido por seu porte físico e atuações maduras, ele é uma das figuras mais estáveis e respeitadas de sua agência.

data.biography:
Rachael Harris (born January 12, 1968) is an American actress and comedian. The accolades she has received include nominations for an Independent Spirit Award and a Saturn Award.

In film, Harris has had lead roles as Susan Heffley in the Diary of a Wimpy Kid film series (2010–2012) and Linda White in Natural Selection (2011). She has also had notable supporting roles in For Your Consideration (2006), The Hangover (2009), Bad Words (2013), Night at the Museum: Secret of the Tomb (2014), Old Dads (2023), and Mother of the Bride (2024).

In television, Harris has had main cast roles as Cooper on the ABC sitcom Notes from the Underbelly (2007–2008), Joanne Dunlevy on the Fox sitcom Surviving Jack (2014), Dr. Linda Martin on the Fox and Netflix fantasy series Lucifer (2016–2021), and Nora on season 1 of the Disney+ and Hulu horror series Goosebumps (2023). She had a recurring role as Sheila Sazs on the USA Network series Suits (2012–2019).

data.biography: Saleem Mairaj was born in Karachi, Pakistan. He began his career as a theatre actor and acted in various plays. He gained popularity through his debut television serial titled "Colony 52" which was aired on Pakistan Television Corporation (now PTV Home) in 1990s. He has since appeared in various television serials. His work in television includes Ishq Ki Inteha (2009), Kash Main Teri Beti Na Hoti (2011), Ullu Baraye Farokht Nahi (2013), Kise Apna Kahein (2014) and Kitni Girhain Baaki Hain (2014). Saleem made his Lollywood debut in 2007 horror film Zibahkhana. He has also starred in 2008 drama film Ramchand Pakistani and 2013 mystery thriller film Josh: Independence Through Unity. Saleem has made a cameo appearance in 2014 comedy film Na Maloom Afraad and in its sequel Na Maloom Afraad 2 (2017). He will appear in Upcoming Action-Comedy film Jhol, and in the horror flick Pari.
data.name: Saleem Mairaj

data.biography:
Jannik Schümann (* 30. November 1992 in Hamburg) ist ein deutscher Schauspieler, Musicaldarsteller und Synchronsprecher.  2003 folgte eine erste Fernsehrolle in einer Folge der ZDF-Serie Die Rettungsflieger. 2007 war er in dem Fernsehzweiteiler Das Glück am anderen Ende der Welt zu sehen sowie als mordverdächtiger Jugendlicher Felix Freiberg im Tatort: Liebeshunger. Neben weiteren Gastrollen in Fernsehreihen und -serien synchronisierte er die Hauptrollen für die Kinofilme Die drei ???. Wiederkehrende Fernsehrollen in Kinder- und Jugendserien hatte Schümann als umschwärmter Fußballtrainer und vermeintlicher Brandstifter in Die Pfefferkörner (2009) sowie in der englischsprachigen Produktion Emmas Chatroom (2010/11).

Einem breiteren Publikum wurde Schümann durch seine Mitwirkung in dem preisgekrönten Fernsehfilm Homevideo (2011) bekannt. In dem Drama über Cyber-Mobbing unter Schülern war er in der Nebenrolle des intriganten Henry zu sehen, der ein kompromittierendes Video seines Klassenkameraden Jakob (gespielt von Jonas Nay) ins Internet stellt. Im selben Jahr gab Schümann sein Kinodebüt mit der Nebenrolle des Mario in Christian Petzolds Drama Barbara und war als hyperaktiver, internetaffiner sowie mit Pillen dealender Sohn eines Schulleiters (Herbert Knaup) in Martin Enlens Fernsehfilm Mittlere Reife zu sehen.  Anfang September 2013 war er ein zweites Mal in der Fernsehkrimireihe Tatort zu sehen. Im Oktober 2013 spielte er im Bella-Block-Krimi Angeklagt den jungen Felix Larson. Im selben Monat erschien Gregor Schnitzlers Verfilmung Spieltrieb, in der er die männliche Hauptrolle des Alev übernahm. In der Bestsellerverfilmung von Andreas Steinhöfels Die Mitte der Welt übernahm er die Rolle des Nicholas.

Im Fernsehspielfilm Mein Sohn Helen, der im April 2015 auf Das Erste ausgestrahlt wurde, war er in der Hauptrolle des 16-jährigen Finn Wilke zu sehen. Seit Mai 2016 übernahm er in der TV-Reihe Die Diplomatin die Rolle von Nikolaus Tanz. Anfang Dezember 2018 war er zum dritten Mal in der TV-Reihe Tatort.

In der zweiten Staffel der Historienserie Charité spielte er 2019 den Sanitätsoffizier und Bruder der Medizinstudentin Anni Waldhausen, Otto Marquardt, der sich verbotenerweise in den Chirurgie-Pfleger Martin Schelling verliebt. Ab Oktober 2019 war er in Dem Horizont so nah als Kickboxer und Model Danny Taylor, der durch seine Kindheit – er wurde geschlagen und vergewaltigt – schwer gezeichnet ist, in den deutschen Kinos zu sehen. Für den ProSieben-Fernsehfilm 9 Tage wach (2020) übernahm er die Rolle des Crystal Meth-abhängigen Schauspielers Eric Stehfest.

Jannik Schümann is a German actor, musical performer, and voice actor. He studied English Studies and Media Studies at Humboldt University of Berlin, where he wrote his bachelor thesis on queer-coding in Disney films.

Schümann lives in Berlin with his partner Felix Kruck; they announced their engagement in March 2024.

He began his TV career in 2003 with The Rescue Pilots. He had roles in A Life So Far Away (2007) and Tatort: Love Hunger (2007). In 2011, he gained wider recognition by playing Henry in the TV movie Homevideo and made his film debut in Barbara (2012) as Mario. That same year, he played the principal’s son in Middle Maturity.

In 2015 he starred as Finn Wilke in My Son Helen (2015).

He played the role of Nicholas in the film adaptation of Andreas Steinhöfel’s bestselling novel Center of My World (2016).

And he's played Nikolaus Tanz in The Diplomat since 2016.

Other appearances include Monster Hunter (2020), Tribes of Europa (2021), and Charité at War (2019).
data.name: Jannik Schümann

data.biography:
Kazuki Yao (jap. 矢尾 一樹, Yao Kazuki) ist ein japanischer Synchronsprecher (Seiyū), der vor allem in Animes und OVAs auftritt. Bekannte Rollen von Yao sind Zoruru in Keroro Gunsō, Toren Smith in Gunbuster, Tiger in Monster Rancher, Bunshichi Tawara in Tenjo Tenge und verschiedene Rollen in One Piece, unter anderem Franky.

1984 hatte er sein Debüt als Synchronsprecher als Shurugi Namu in der OVA Birth. Am 29. Juni 1990 heiratete er die Synchronsprecherin Mīna Tominaga, die er aus Birth kannte. Später ließen sich beide voneinander scheiden und er heiratete die Synchronsprecherin Urara Takano mit der er eine Tochter namens Anna (杏奈) hat.

Quelle: Wikipedia
data.name: Kazuki Yao

data.biography:
矢尾一树（日语：矢尾 一樹／やお かずき Yao Kazuki，1959年6月17日—）是日本男性声优。代表作有《机动战士高达ZZ》的（杰特·亚希达）、《超兽机神断空我》的藤原忍，而藤原忍的名句“やってやるぜ！！”更成为剧中经典、《航海王》的佛朗基（至2024年12月止）。

矢尾是人气动画作品《航海王》常设角色之一“佛朗基”的配音员，其角色于2005年5月22日（动画第233集）初次亮相。2024年12月，传出他由于健康原因辞任，结束这段将近二十年的合作。
data.name: 矢尾一树

data.biography: 矢尾一樹，1959 年 6 月 17 日出生，日本男性聲優，以低沉沙啞而極具爆發力的嗓音而聞名；與松野太紀結成聲優組合“薔薇組”。代表作有《超獸機神斷空我》藤原忍、《海賊王》芬奇、Mr. 2、夏洛特·塔布雷特、贊高、假烏索普《機動戰士高達 ZZ》的捷多‧亞西塔等；與另一知名聲優飛田展男關係甚密，愛稱其為“小飛”。

data.biography: Olivia Alexandra Nita was born and raised in Bucharest, Romania. She started studying violin at the age of six and continued for twelve years until she graduated "George Enescu" Music High School in 2006. At the age of eleven she was cast in the play "A Lost Letter" ("O Scrisoare Pierduta") at the National Theatre in Bucharest next to big names of the Romanian Theatre and directed by the critically acclaimed Alexandru Tocilescu, for which she gathered great reviews. When she was fifteen she started working for Prima TV Channel, in the popular and successful Tv Show "Cronica Carcotasilor" ("The Grumpy Chronicles") for three years until 2006 when she was admitted at the Acting program at the National University of Theatre and Film "I.L.Caragiale" (U.N.A.T.C.) until 2008 when she transferred in United Kingdom and graduated BA Hons Degree in Acting. While she was in University she worked for the Acasa Tv Channel in the soap opera "Daria, My Love", The ScyFy Channel production "Hellhounds" directed by Ricky Schroeder, "Radu+Ana" short film and several theatre productions as "The Whale Hunt", "The Statue of Liberty", Three Sisters", "The House of Bernarda Alba". After graduating Bachelor Degree in United Kingdom she returned in Romania where she did an MA in Acting, followed by Mandragora Movies Academy classes where she studied Ivanna Chubbuck Technique with Franz Turner and David Lipper.
data.name: Olivia Niță

data.biography:
吴晓亮，演员，毕业于中央民族大学。

2004年，出演个人首部电影《没有音乐照样跳舞》，从而正式进入演艺圈。2006年，在青春爱情电影《青春期》中饰演永亮，从而受到关注。2007年，主演剧情电影《摊开你的地图》。2008年，出演个人首部电视剧《八千湘女上天山》。2010年，出演家庭情感剧《风车》。2012年，出演的爱情电影《第一次》上映 。2013年，出演年代剧《黄金大劫案》。2015年，主演惊悚喜剧电影《异闻录之捉妖兄弟》。2016年，出演古装传奇剧《重耳传》。2017年，其出演的古装武侠电影《绣春刀Ⅱ：修罗战场》上映，在片中饰演丁泰。2018年，出演古装悬疑剧《长安十二时辰》。2019年，参与出演郭帆执导的科幻电影《流浪地球》。同年12月，凭电影《日光之下》获得第四届澳门国际影展“新华语映像”最佳男主角奖。2020年，凭借电影《日光之下》获第44届香港国际电影节 新秀电影竞赛（华语）单元最佳男演员奖。
data.name: 吴晓亮

吳曉亮，演員，畢業於中央民族大學。

2004 年，出演個人首部電影《沒有音樂照樣跳舞》，從而正式進入演藝圈。2006 年，在青春愛情電影《青春期》中飾演永亮，從而受到關注。2007 年，主演劇情電影《攤開你的地圖》。2008 年，出演個人首部電視劇《八千湘女上天山》。2010 年，出演家庭情感劇《風車》。2012 年，出演的愛情電影《第一次》上映 。2013 年，出演年代劇《黃金大劫案》。2015 年，主演驚悚喜劇電影《異聞錄之捉妖兄弟》。2016 年，出演古裝傳奇劇《重耳傳》。2017 年，其出演的古裝武俠電影《繡春刀Ⅱ：修羅戰場》上映，在片中飾演丁泰。2018 年，出演古裝懸疑劇《長安十二時辰》。2019 年，參與出演郭帆執導的科幻電影《流浪地球》。同年 12 月，憑電影《日光之下》獲得第四屆澳門國際影展“新華語映像”最佳男主角獎。2020 年，憑藉電影《日光之下》獲第 44 屆香港國際電影節 新秀電影競賽（華語）單元最佳男演員獎。
data.name: 吳曉亮

data.biography:
陈兵，又名斌子，演员，毕业于北京体育大学。

2000年，斌子通过参演高群书导演执导的犯罪剧《命案十三宗之兄弟之杀》出道。同年斌子首次参演电影《重振精武门》，饰演冈本。2003年，斌子因与孙红雷、石兆琪共同出演犯罪片《征服》，而被观众熟识。2012年，斌子以《永不磨灭的番号》这部电视剧获得白玉兰最佳电视剧银奖。

data.biography:
陳兵，又名陳兵，演員，畢業於北京體育大學。

2000 年，陳兵通過參演高羣書導演執導的犯罪劇《命案十三宗之兄弟之殺》出道。同年陳兵首次參演電影《重振精武門》，飾演岡本。2003 年，陳兵因與孫紅雷、石兆琪共同出演犯罪片《徵服》，而被觀眾熟識。2012 年，陳兵以《永不磨滅的番號》這部電視劇獲得白玉蘭最佳電視劇銀獎。
data.name: 陳兵

data.biography:
印小天，男，1978年9月23日出生于辽宁省沈阳市，中国国家话剧院演员，毕业于中央戏剧学院表演系1994级，凭借《烈火英雄》，2020年11月28日获得第33届中国电影金鸡奖最佳男配角奖。

1997年，印小天参演首部电视剧《家事风云》。2002年，主演海岩电视剧《拿什么拯救你，我的爱人》一举成名。2005年4月，与黄晓明、于娜主演《女才男貌》。2006年主演都市情感剧《窗外有张脸》。同年参演电视剧《大院子女》。

2010年，印小天主演电视剧《别动我幸福》。2014年8月，央视播出纪念邓小平诞辰110周年的献礼大剧《历史转折中的邓小平》，印小天饰演从北京下放到云南的知青“田源” 。同年参演武侠剧《神雕侠侣》。2015年上映其参演抗战胜利70周年的电影《百团大战》。同年主演抗战剧《巨浪》。2016年主演谍战剧《解密》。2017年，与瑛子、巫刚领衔主演的香港回归20周年贺礼剧《我的1997》，饰演高建国一角。7月，与聂远、黄海冰领衔主演的大型海洋题材电视剧《东方有大海》，饰演中国近代著名海军将领萨镇冰。2018年，与黄轩、Angelababy主演的都市情感创业剧《创业时代》在浙江卫视、东方卫视播出，饰演成熟稳重的天使投资人高迪。

2020年，印小天参加综艺节目《追光吧，哥哥》。2021年5月，出演的革命历史题材剧《光荣与梦想》在北京卫视、东方卫视及腾讯视频、爱奇艺、优酷同步播出。
data.name: 印小天

data.biography:
印小天，男，1978 年 9 月 23 日出生於遼寧省瀋陽市，中國國家話劇院演員，畢業於中央戲劇學院表演系 1994 級，憑藉《烈火英雄》，2020 年 11 月 28 日獲得第 33 屆中國電影金雞獎最佳男配角獎。

1997 年，印小天參演首部電視劇《家事風雲》。2002 年，主演海巖電視劇《拿什麼拯救你，我的愛人》一舉成名。2005 年 4 月，與黃曉明、於娜主演《女才男貌》。2006 年主演都市情感劇《窗外有張臉》。同年參演電視劇《大院子女》。

2010 年，印小天主演電視劇《別動我幸福》。2014 年 8 月，央視播出紀念鄧小平誕辰 110 週年的獻禮大劇《歷史轉折中的鄧小平》，印小天飾演從北京下放到雲南的知青“田源” 。同年參演武俠劇《神鵰俠侶》。2015 年上映其參演抗戰勝利 70 週年的電影《百團大戰》。同年主演抗戰劇《巨浪》。2016 年主演諜戰劇《解密》。2017 年，與瑛子、巫剛領銜主演的香港迴歸 20 週年賀禮劇《我的 1997》，飾演高建國一角。7 月，與聶遠、黃海冰領銜主演的大型海洋題材電視劇《東方有大海》，飾演中國近代著名海軍將領薩鎮冰。2018 年，與黃軒、Angelababy 主演的都市情感創業劇《創業時代》在浙江衞視、東方衞視播出，飾演成熟穩重的天使投資人高迪。

2020 年，印小天參加綜藝節目《追光吧，哥哥》。2021 年 5 月，出演的革命歷史題材劇《光榮與夢想》在北京衞視、東方衞視及騰訊視頻、愛奇藝、優酷同步播出。
data.name: 印小天

data.biography:
于波，1976年7月22日生于辽宁省沈阳市，中国内地影视男演员，毕业于北京电影学院。

2002年，于波因主演武侠剧《萧十一郎》而正式进入影视圈 。2003年，他主演的科幻电视剧《少年王》播出 。2004年，于波主演的武侠剧《水月洞天》播出  。2006年，主演的古装魔幻剧《幻影神针》播出，获得同时段收视冠军。2007年，主演的都市爱情剧《让爱化作珍珠雨》播出。2008年，他领衔主演的警匪剧《迅雷急先锋》播出。2010年，其主演的古装喜剧《包三姑外传》播出。

2011年，领衔主演的历史片《先驱者》在中国内地上映  。2013年，主演的古装片《忠烈杨家将》上映，他凭借该片获得上海国际电影节成龙动作电影周“钢铁人奖”最佳动作男演员提名。2014年，参演喜剧片《六福喜事》上映。2015年，他主演的古装片《新步步惊心》在中国内地上映。2016年，其主演的上古题材电影《轩辕大帝》上映。2017年，主演的古装剧《孤芳不自赏》播出。2018年，主演的民国传奇剧《人生若如初相见》播出 。2019年，主演的谍战剧《战地迷情》播出。
data.name: 于波

Năm 2002, anh tham gia diễn xuất chính trong bộ phim võ hiệp Tiêu Thập Nhất Lang và chính thức bước vào nghề diễn xuất.

data.biography:
于波，生於遼寧省瀋陽市，中國內地影視男演員，畢業於北京電影學院。

2002年，于波因主演武俠劇《蕭十一郎》而正式進入影視圈。2003年，他主演的科幻電視劇《少年王》播出。2004年，于波主演的武俠劇《水月洞天》播出。2006年，主演的古裝魔幻劇《幻影神針》播出，獲得同時段收視冠軍。2007年，主演的都市愛情劇《讓愛化作珍珠雨》播出。2008 年，他領銜主演的警匪劇《迅雷急先鋒》播出。2010年，其主演的古裝喜劇《包三姑外傳》播出。

2011年，領銜主演的歷史片《先驅者》在中國內地上映。2013年，主演的古裝片《忠烈楊家將》上映，他憑藉該片獲得上海國際電影節成龍動作電影周“鐵甲奇俠獎”最佳動作男演員提名。2014年，參演喜劇片《六福喜事》上映。2015年，他主演的古裝片《新步步驚心》在中國內地上映。2016年，其主演的上古題材電影《軒轅大帝》上映。2017年，主演的古裝劇《孤芳不自賞》播出。2018年，主演的民國傳奇劇《人生若如初相見》播出。2019年，主演的諜戰劇《戰地迷情》播出。
data.name: 于波

data.biography: Dato' Aaron Mustapha bin Aziz (Jawi: ارون مصطفى بن عزيز; born 23 February 1976) is a Singaporean actor and director. He is largely known in Malaysia and also in some countries such as Taiwan, Hong Kong, India, Brunei and Singapore.
data.name: Aaron Aziz

data.biography: Dato' Aaron Mustapha bin Aziz ialah seorang pelakon lelaki Singapura yang amat dikenali di Singapura dan Malaysia. Beliau memulakan kerjaya lakonannya di negara kelahirannya pada 2001 menerusi watak Shahril dalam Cinta Bollywood (2001-2002), seterusnya melakonkan watak Bob dalam Jeritan Sepi (2001-2002) dan sebagai Koperal Jamal Salleh dalam Heartlanders (2002-2005). Watak televisyen Singapura beliau termasuk Zack Ahmad dalam sitkom Phua Chu Kang (musim 6) dan Iqmal dalam siri drama Cinta Q. Beliau berhijrah ke Malaysia pada 2004 untuk memulakan kerjaya lakonannya menerusi watak pembantu dalam drama Haryati (2004). Kredit lakonannya di Malaysia termasuk Emil Emilda, Sadiq & Co, Nora Elena, Adam & Hawa, Evolusi KL Drift: The Series dan Kusinero Cinta. Kredit filem beliau termasuk Evolusi KL Drift (2008-10), Bohsia: Jangan Pilih Jalan Hitam (2009), Pisau Cukur (2009), KL Gangster (2011-13), Ombak Rindu (2011), Lari (2013), Suamiku, Encik Perfect 10 (2015), Dekatnya Cinta (2021), Sheriff: Narko Integriti (2024) dan The Experts (2024). Aaron merupakan duta bagi produk Drive M7, Maggi, dan L'Oréal. Sepanjang kerjayanya, Aaron telah menerima pelbagai anugerah dan pencalonan dalam kerjayanya termasuk Pesta Perdana Singapura, Anugerah Bintang Popular Berita Harian, Anugerah Skrin dan Anugerah MeleTOP Era.
data.name: Aaron Aziz

data.biography:
John M. Slattery, Jr. (born August 13, 1962) is an American actor and director, best known for his roles as Roger Sterling on AMC's series Mad Men, Frank Jaffe in Confess, Fletch, Howard Stark (Tony Stark's father) in the Marvel movie series, Paul LeBlanc on FOX's NEXT, Dwight Eisenhower in Churchill, Lyle Bettencourt on CBS's The Good Fight,  Richardson in The Adjustment Bureau, Cravely in Charlie Wilson's War, Bud Gerber in Flags of Our Fathers, Peter Benedict on WB's Jack & Bobby, Roland Yates in Bad Company, Dr. Richard Meyers on Lifetime's sitcom Maggie, FBI Agent Corman in Eraser, and Al Kahn on ABC's Homefront.

He has been married to actress Talia Balsam since 1998 and they have a son, Henry.
data.name: John Slattery

data.biography:
John M. Slattery, Jr. (nacido el 13 de agosto de 1962) es un actor y director estadounidense, mejor conocido por su papel de Roger Sterling en la serie Mad Men de AMC.

Descripción arriba del artículo de Wikipedia John Slattery, con licencia de CC-BY-SA, lista completa de colaboradores en Wikipedia.

John Slattery urodził się w 1963 iw Bostonie, Massachusetts, gdzie także się wychowywał, z czego teraz jest dumny. Aktualnie jest żonatyy z Talią Balsam, byłą żoną George`a Clooney`a. John po raz pierwszy pojawił sie w serialu w roku 1988 a był to "The Dirty Dozen: the Series" i od tamtego czasu nie przestaje ciężko pracować. Jego dorobek telewizyjny obejmuje seriale takie jak "Under Cover", "Homefront", "Maggie," i "Feds" oraz mini-seriale: "A Woman of Independent Means", w którym gra z Sally Field i "From the Earth to the Moon", w którym gra Waltera Mondalę. Dzięki swoim rolom w "Will and Grace" jako starszy brat Willa - Sam, "Judging Amy" jako oziębły mąż Amy oraz "Sex and the City", John stał się jednym z najbardziej poszukiwanych aktorów. W 2001 zagrał w serialu komediowym NBC pt. "Ed" rolę dyrektora szkoły średniej - Denisa Martino. Ta kreacja przyniosła mu wielka popularność i stała się obiektem dyskusji fanów serialu. John odnosi też sukcesy na deskach teatrów. Jego teatralny debiut przypada na rok 1989, kiedy to zagrał w "Lisbon Traviata". Bardzo owocna okazała się współpraca z dramaturgiem Richardem Greenburgiem. Pojawił się w paru sztukach tego autora m.in. w "Night and Her Stars" oraz "Three Days of Rain. Za role w tej ostatniej dostał nagrodę krytyki za podwójną rolę ojca i syna. W 1993 debiutuje na Broadway`u występując w "Laughter on the 23rd Floor". Powrócił do teatru w roku 2000 rolą w "Betrayal" W filmie zadebiutował w 1996 gościnnym występem w filmie "City Hall". Od tamtego czasu pojawił się w "Eraser", "Where's Marlow?", "Traffic" i "Bad Company". W roku 2004 wystąpił z Julią Roberts w "Mona Lisa Smile" oraz w drugiej części "Dirty Dancing" - "Havana Nights".

data.overview: Ông Hoàng Mua Sắm (쇼핑왕 루이/Shopping King Louis) là một bộ phim truyền hình Hàn Quốc phát sóng năm 2016 trên đài MBC, với các diễn viên chính là Seo In-guk, Nam Ji-hyun, Yoon Sang-hyun và Im Se-mi. Đây là một bộ phim hài lãng mạn kể về Louis (Seo In-guk), một người thừa kế giàu có luôn bỏ tiền ra mua những món đồ mang vẻ đẹp tinh tế. Một ngày nọ, anh bị mất trí nhớ và gặp được Bok-Shil (Nam Ji-hyun), một người phụ nữ vô tư và tràn đầy năng lượng từ vùng nông thôn. Cô đã rất kinh ngạc vì thói quen chi tiêu của Louis. Trong quá trình giảng dạy cho Louis về thói quen chi tiêu tiết kiệm, cô nhận ra sự khác biệt về nhu cầu của từng người và sự định hình cuộc sống của họ. Cả hai đều có những nét ngây thơ bẩm sinh và cùng chăm sóc cho nhau dẫn tới một tình yêu được hình thành.

data.biography: Antje Traue ist eine deutsche Schauspielerin. data.biography:
Antje Traue, 18 Ocak 1981 tarihinde Mittweida, Saksonya'da (o dönemki Doğu Almanya) dünyaya gelmiştir. Sahne sanatlarına olan yeteneği erken yaşta keşfedilen Traue, çocukluğunda seçkin bir spor eğitimi merkezinde artistik jimnastik eğitimi aldı. Ancak yaşadığı bir sakatlık sonrası odağını müzik ve tiyatroya çevirdi.

Lise yıllarında okul tiyatrosunda Jeanne d'Arc rolüyle sahneye çıkan oyuncu, henüz 16 yaşındayken "West End Opera" hip-hop müzikalinde başrolü üstlendi ve bu yapımla Avrupa ile New York turnesine katıldı. 2002 yılında Berlin'e taşınarak sinema ve televizyon kariyerine odaklanma kararı aldı. İlk sinema deneyimini "Kleinruppin Forever" (2004) komedisiyle yaşasa da, kariyerinin ilk yıllarında aradığı rolleri bulmakta zorlandı ve oyunculuğu bırakıp tıp eğitimi almayı düşündüğü bir dönem yaşadı.

Kariyerinin dönüm noktası, Christian Alvart'ın yönettiği bilimkurgu-korku filmi "Pandorum" (2009) için yapılan seçmelerde gerçekleşti. Dennis Quaid ve Ben Foster ile başrolü paylaştığı bu filmde canlandırdığı Nadia karakteri, hem fiziksel performansı hem de yoğun oyunculuğuyla Hollywood'un kapılarını ona açtı. Bu filmdeki performansı, ünlü yönetmen Zack Snyder'ın dikkatini çekti ve Traue'nin kariyerindeki en büyük sıçramayı yapmasını sağladı.

2013 yapımı dev bütçeli süper kahraman filmi "Man of Steel" (Çelik Adam) kadrosuna dahil olan Traue, Superman'in düşmanı General Zod'un sağ kolu Sub-Commander Faora-Ul'u canlandırdı. Soğukkanlı, disiplinli ve ölümcül performansı, özellikle de Henry Cavill ile olan dövüş sahnelerindeki ustalığıyla küresel bir şöhrete kavuştu ve karakteri filmin en ikonik unsurlarından biri haline geldi.

Hollywood kariyerine Jeff Bridges ve Julianne Moore ile "Seventh Son" (2014), Ryan Reynolds ve Helen Mirren ile "Woman in Gold" (2015) ve Kevin Costner ile "Criminal" (Suçlu) (2016) gibi yapımlarla devam etti. Ancak uluslararası başarısına rağmen Avrupa sinemasıyla bağını koparmadı. Netflix'in dünya çapında fenomen olan ilk Alman orijinal dizisi "Dark"ta (2017-2020) gizemli Agnes Nielsen karakterine hayat vererek dramatik derinliğini bir kez daha kanıtladı. Ayrıca "Das Boot" (2019) dizisinde ve çeşitli Alman suç dramalarında ("Polizeiruf 110", "Tatort") rol aldı.

2023 yılında, on yıl aradan sonra DC Genişletilmiş Evreni'ne (DCEU) geri dönerek "The Flash" filminde hayranların favorisi Faora-Ul rolünü tekrar canlandırdı. Anadili Almanca'nın yanı sıra akıcı derecede İngilizce konuşabilen Antje Traue, hem aksiyon hem de drama türlerinde yetkinliğini kanıtlamış çok yönlü bir oyuncu olarak kariyerine devam etmektedir.

data.overview: Phim Kiếm Rồng lấy bối cảnh diễn ra dưới thời Tây Hán, phim xoay quanh câu chuyện của đại tướng quân Hoắc An (Thành Long) với sứ mệnh bảo vệ sự bình yên cho các nước chư hầu ở Tây Vực. Với tài năng, sự kiên trung và tình yêu hòa bình, Hoắc An đã liên kết với các huynh đệ từng vào sinh ra tử với mình lập nên liên minh “Quyết tử cho hòa bình”.  Thế nhưng, ông lại bị gian thần hãm hại, bị đày tới biên cương và chịu cảnh nô dịch hà khắc. May mắn thay, Hoắc An đã được đại tướng quân Tiberius (John Cusack) trên đường hộ tống hoàng tử tới phương Đông giải thoát. Từ đây, hai vị tướng quân anh hùng gắn kết thành tâm giao tri kỷ cùng chung lý tưởng bảo vệ chính nghĩa, xây dựng hòa bình. Hai người sát cánh bên nhau trải qua hàng loạt những trận đấu ly kỳ và những sự kiện đầy chấn động.

data.biography: Kerry Bishé (geboren am 1. data.biography:
David Gulpilil Rigjimiraril Dalaithngu (* 1953 in Maningrida, Arnhemland, Northern Territory; † 29. November 2021 in Murray Bridge, South Australia) war ein australischer Schauspieler und Tänzer.

1970 hatte er seinen ersten Auftritt neben Hauptdarstellerin Jenny Agutter in dem international erfolgreichen Film Walkabout des britischen Regisseurs Nicolas Roeg. In den folgenden 50 Jahren war Gulpilil in einer Vielzahl von Filmen und Fernsehproduktionen zu sehen und galt weithin als wichtigster aboriginesischer Schauspieler seiner Generation.

Kommerziell erfolgreich war 1976 Storm Boy mit ihm in einer der großen Rollen, auch in der gleichnamigen Neuverfilmung von 2019 sollte er einen Auftritt haben. In dem Kassenerfolg Crocodile Dundee – Ein Krokodil zum Küssen übernahm er 1986 eine Nebenrolle. 2006 trat Gulpilil in dem Film 10 Kanus, 150 Speere und 3 Frauen (Ten Canoes) von Regisseur Rolf de Heer auf, der im gleichen Jahr den Spezialpreis der Jury beim Cannes Film Festival gewann. Hauptrollen hatte er unter anderem in den Filmen The Tracker (2002) und Charlie's Country (2013) inne. International vielbeachtet wurde sein Auftritt in dem von Regisseur Baz Luhrmann inszenierten australischen Filmepos Australia (2008) neben Nicole Kidman und Hugh Jackman.
David Gulpilil Ridjimiraril Dalaithngu AM，专业名称为 David Gulpilil，因文化原因被追授为大卫·达莱森古 （David Dalaithngu） 三天，是一位澳大利亚原住民 （Yolŋu） 演员和舞者，以电影而闻名 Walkabout、Storm Boy、Rabbit-Proof Fence 和 The Tracker。
data.name: 大卫·古皮利

data.biography:
Marina Massironi (Legnano, 16 maggio 1963) è un'attrice, comica e doppiatrice italiana di teatro, cinema e televisione, nota anche per essere stata spalla di scena del trio Aldo, Giovanni e Giacomo.

Iniziò gli studi di recitazione alla fine del 1982 ed ebbe le sue prime scritture teatrali circa due anni dopo. Nel frattempo sposatasi con Giacomo Poretti, intraprese con questi l'attività cabarettistica, creando il duo noto con il nome di Hansel & Strüdel. Il divorzio da Poretti non cessò tuttavia la collaborazione artistica con l'attore, nel frattempo divenuto parte del trio Aldo, Giovanni e Giacomo: a partire dagli anni novanta Marina Massironi ha collaborato con il trio sia in televisione, sia al cinema che, infine, al teatro. Infatti il suo film d'esordio fu in loro compagnia in Tre uomini e una gamba, partecipando successivamente a Così è la vita e Chiedimi se sono felice. Nel 1998 recita in Fuori dal mondo con Margherita Buy e nel 2000 vince sia il Nastro d'Argento sia il David di Donatello come migliore attrice non protagonista per Pane e tulipani.

Attualmente vive tra Roma e Milano.
data.name: Marina Massironi

data.biography:
Marina Massironi (16 de maio de 1963) é uma atriz italiana, comediante e dubladora de teatro, cinema e televisão, também conhecida por ter sido parceira de palco do trio Aldo, Giovanni e Giacomo.

Ela começou a estudar atuação no final de 1982 e teve seus primeiros escritos teatrais cerca de dois anos depois. Nesse ínterim, casada com Giacomo Poretti, assumiu com ele o negócio de cabaré, formando a dupla Hansel & Strüdel. O divórcio de Poretti, no entanto, não cessou a colaboração artística com o ator, que entretanto passou a fazer parte do trio Aldo, Giovanni e Giacomo: desde os anos noventa Marina Massironi colabora com o trio tanto na televisão como no cinema e , finalmente, no teatro. Na verdade, seu filme de estreia foi em sua companhia em Três homens e uma perna, posteriormente participando de Então é a vida e me pergunte se estou feliz. Em 1998 ela estrelou Out of the world com Margherita Buy e em 2000 ganhou o Nastro d'Argento e o David di Donatello como melhor atriz coadjuvante por Pane e tulipani.

Ela atualmente vive entre Roma e Milão.

玛丽娜·马西罗尼（1963年5月16日出生于意大利莱尼亚诺）是一位意大利女演员、喜剧演员和戏剧、电影和电视配音演员，也是阿尔多、乔瓦尼和贾科莫三人组的舞台搭档。

他于 1982 年底开始学习表演，大约两年后有了他的第一部戏剧作品。与此同时，她嫁给了贾科莫·波雷蒂（Giacomo Poretti），并与他一起开始了她的歌舞表演业务，创建了名为Hansel&Strüdel的二人组。然而，与波雷蒂的离婚并没有停止与这位演员的艺术合作，与此同时，他已成为阿尔多、乔瓦尼和贾科莫三人组的一员：自九十年代以来，玛丽娜·马西罗尼（Marina Massironi）在电视、电影院和剧院中都与三人组合作。事实上，他的处女作是在他们的公司拍摄的《三个男人和一条腿》，后来又参加了《Così è la vita》和《Chiedimi se sono felice》。1998年，她与玛格丽特·布伊（Margherita Buy）一起出演了Fuori dal mondo，2000年，她凭借《面包和郁金香》获得了Nastro d'Argento奖和大卫·迪·多纳泰罗奖（David di Donatello）的最佳女配角奖。

他目前住在罗马和米兰之间。
data.name: 玛丽娜·马西罗尼

瑪麗娜·馬西羅尼（1963 年 5 月 16 日出生於義大利萊尼亞諾）是一位義大利女演員、喜劇演員和戲劇、電影和電視配音演員，也是阿爾多、喬瓦尼和賈科莫三人組的舞台搭檔。

他於 1982 年底開始學習表演，大約兩年後有了他的第一部戲劇作品。與此同時，她嫁給了賈科莫·波雷蒂（Giacomo Poretti），並與他一起開始了她的歌舞表演業務，創建了名為 Hansel&Strüdel 的二人組。然而，與波雷蒂的離婚並沒有停止與這位演員的藝術合作，與此同時，他已成為阿爾多、喬瓦尼和賈科莫三人組的一員：自九十年代以來，瑪麗娜·馬西羅尼（Marina Massironi）在電視、電影院和劇院中都與三人組合作。事實上，他的處女作是在他們的公司拍攝的《三個男人和一條腿》，後來又參加了《Così è la vita》和《Chiedimi se sono felice》。1998 年，她與瑪格麗特·布伊（Margherita Buy）一起出演了 Fuori dal mondo，2000 年，她憑借《麵包和鬱金香》獲得了 Nastro d'Argento 獎和大衞·迪·多納泰羅獎（David di Donatello）的最佳女配角獎。

他目前住在羅馬和米蘭之間。

data.biography:
Ana Gasteyer (* 4. Mai 1967 in Washington, D.C.) ist eine US-amerikanische Komikerin und Schauspielerin.

Ana Gasteyer sammelte erste Erfahrungen bei dem Improvisationstheater The Groundlings, bei dem u. a. auch Mindy Sterling, Maya Rudolph, Will Forte, Lisa Kudrow, Jon Lovitz, Cheryl Hines, Will Ferrell und Jennifer Coolidge spielten.

Nach kleineren Engagements in Serien wie Seinfeld war sie von 1996 bis 2002 Teil des Ensembles der Fernsehsendung Saturday Night Live, dem in dieser Zeit unter anderen Tracy Morgan, Will Ferrell, Maya Rudolph und Tina Fey angehörten. Parallel spielte sie vorwiegend Episodenrollen in den Fernsehserien Party of Five, New York Cops – NYPD Blue, Law & Order, Just Shoot Me – Redaktion durchgeknipst, Verrückt nach dir, Hinterm Mond gleich links, Frasier, die Hauptrolle in dem Kurzfilm A Small Domain und kleinere Rollen in den Filmen Schlimmer geht’s immer!, Deedles – Die Surfer mit dem Brett vorm Kopf und Woman on Top. In der Komödie Ich liebe Dick spielt sie US-Präsident Richard Nixons Sekretärin Rose Mary Woods.

Nach SNL arbeitete sie erneut mit Tina Fey, die das Drehbuch des Films Girls Club – Vorsicht bissig! (Mean Girls) schrieb. Weitere Filmauftritte hatte sie in Kifferwahn, The Women – Von großen und kleinen Affären, Dare – Hab’ keine Angst. Tu’s einfach!, Fun Size – Süßes oder Saures, Der Chaos-Dad, Peeples und Rapture-Palooza. Nach weiteren Episodenauftritten in den Serien Chuck und Running Wilde konnte sie in Good Wife eine Figur über drei, in Lass es, Larry! über zwei Episoden spielen. In der Serie Suburgatory wurde ihre anfängliche Nebenrolle als Sheila Shay zur Mitte der ersten Staffel zu einer Hauptrolle ausgebaut.

Für die Darstellung ihrer Rolle Elphaba in dem Musical Wicked – Die Hexen von Oz in Chicago wurde sie 2006 für einen Jefferson Award in der Kategorie „Beste Hauptdarstellerin in einem Musical“ nominiert.

Kurt Steven Angle is an American retired professional wrestler, Olympic gold medalist in American freestyle wrestling, and former collegiate wrestler. He is best known for his tenures in WWE and Total Nonstop Action Wrestling (TNA).

While at Clarion University of Pennsylvania, Angle won numerous accolades, including being a two-time NCAA Division I Wrestling Champion in the heavyweight division. After graduating from college, Angle won the gold medal in freestyle wrestling at the 1995 World Wrestling Championships. He then won the freestyle wrestling gold medal at the 1996 Summer Olympics with a broken neck. He is one of four people to complete an amateur wrestling Grand Slam (Junior Nationals, NCAA, World Championships, and Olympics). In 2006, he was named by USA Wrestling as the greatest shoot wrestler ever and one of the top 15 college wrestlers of all time. He was inducted into the International Sports Hall of Fame in 2016 for his amateur accomplishments.

Angle made his first appearance at a pro-wrestling event in 1996, and signed with WWE in 1999. Noted for his rapid comprehension of the business, he had his debut match that August within the company's developmental system after mere days of training, and participated in his first televised WWE storyline in March 1999. After months of dark matches, Angle made his televised in-ring debut in November and received his first major push in the company in February 2000, when he held the European and Intercontinental Championships simultaneously. Four months later, he won the 2000 King of the Ring tournament and soon thereafter began pursuing the WWE Championship, which he won in October. This capped off a WWE rookie year which is considered by many to be the greatest in history. Among other accomplishments in the WWE, Angle has held the WWE Championship four times, the WCW Championship once, and the World Heavyweight Championship once. He is the tenth Triple Crown Champion and the fifth Grand Slam Champion in WWE history. On March 31, 2017, Angle was inducted into the WWE Hall of Fame.

After leaving WWE in 2006, Angle joined Total Nonstop Action Wrestling (TNA) where he became the inaugural and record six-time TNA World Heavyweight Champion, and the second Triple Crown winner in TNA history. Angle is also a two-time King of the Mountain. As part of TNA, he made appearances for New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW) and the Inoki Genome Federation (IGF), holding the IWGP Heavyweight Championship once. In 2013, Angle was inducted into the TNA Hall of Fame: he is the second wrestler, after Sting, to be inducted into both the WWE and TNA Halls of Fame.
data.name: Kurt Angle

data.biography: Anita Briem (D. 29 Mayıs 1982, Reykjavik, İzlanda) İzlandalı bir aktris. Tudors'ta Jane Seymour rolü ve Dünyanın Merkezine Yolculuk'ta Hannah Ásgeirsson rolü ile tanınıyor. Londra'da eğitim gördü ve 2004'te mezun oldu. 19 yaşındayken prestijli Royal Academy of Dramatic Art (RADA) ile kabul edildi. Akıcı İngilizce, Almanca ve italyanca'sı var. Oyunculuk kariyerine dokuz yaşında Ulusal Tiyatro ile başlamıştır.

Anita Briem est née le 29 mai 1982 en Islande. Ses parents sont Ema Þórarinsdóttir, chanteuse, et Gunnlaugur Briem, batteur1 du groupe Mezzoforte. Elle commence à jouer à 9 ans au Théâtre national d'Islande. La famille déménage à Londres lorsque la jeune fille a 16 ans. En 2004, elle est diplômée de la Royal Academy of Dramatic.

Elle est apparue dans des séries telles que Doctor Who en 2005 et Les Tudors en 2008, dans laquelle elle incarne Jeanne Seymour, la troisième épouse du roi Henry VIII.

La prestation d'Anita Briem dans Les Tudors est remarquée, ce qui lui permet d'auditionner pour le film Voyage au centre de la Terre (2008). Elle y obtient un des rôles principaux, aux côtés de Brendan Fraser.

data.overview: Một sinh viên y khoa biến thành thây ma cố gắng giữ lại nhân tính của mình bằng cách ăn não những xác chết ở nhà xác, và phát hiện mình có tài năng phá án mới kỳ lạ.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Cuộc đời thật tuyệt với bác sĩ trẻ Liv, cho đến khi cô biến thành thây ma. Giờ cô là khám nghiệm viên ăn-não với sở trường bắt những kẻ giết người.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Trong lúc Liv ăn-não giúp phá các án mạng một vũ nữ thoát y và các nạn nhân khác, Thiếu tá vật lộn với những thay đổi của mình và Peyton lại tiến vào cuộc đời Liv.

seasons.name: Season 3
seasons.overview: Liv có một kẻ thù mới – Vivian Stoll – chủ tịch tập đoàn Fillmore-Graves, một người có tầm nhìn và luôn ôm mộng dần biến Seattle thành thủ phủ thây ma.

seasons.name: Season 4
seasons.overview: Trong dư chấn của Discovery Day, Liv vướng vào lũ con buôn chợ đen, băng đảng đường phố và nhiều hiểm họa đang hoành hành ở Seattle, nơi hiện là khu vực cách ly xác sống.

seasons.name: Season 5
seasons.overview: Trong mùa cuối, các thây ma ở Seattle đối mặt với tình trạng thiếu lương thực nghiêm trọng, Major nắm quyền tại Fillmore-Graves và số phận của Liv vô cùng bấp bênh.

data.biography:
上白石萌歌（Moka Kamishiraishi），2000年2月28日出生于鹿儿岛县，日本影视女演员、模特、歌手。

2011年，获得第7届“东宝灰姑娘”试唱大奖赛  。2012年，出演悬疑剧《分身》，该片是她个人的首部影视作品  ；同年，开始担任《Pichilemon》杂志专属模特。2013年，出演校园剧《幽灵女友》。2015年，凭借演唱动画片《花样河童》主题曲《ス・マ・イ・ル》以歌手身份出道 。2016年，参演励志电影《金牌男人》  。2018年1月，拍摄的爱情电影《3D女友》上映 ；6月8日，音乐励志电影《羊与钢的森林》上映，并凭借该片获得第42届日本电影学院奖最佳新人奖 ；7月，为动画电影《未来的未来》中的主人公小君配音 。
data.name: 上白石萌歌

data.biography: 姜其永（韩语：강기영，1983年10月14日－），韩国男演员，毕业于 水原大学演剧电影系。在2009年参与的一次公演中出道，及后在多部电视剧如《打架吧鬼神》、《举重妖精金福珠》和《隧道》中所饰演的角色均给观众留下深刻印象。其后，在《金秘书为何那样》中饰演幽默风趣的朴佑值一角得到大众支持，正式打开知名度。
data.name: 姜其永

data.biography: 姜其永（韓語：강기영，1983 年 10 月 14 日－），韓國男演員，畢業於 水原大學演劇電影系。在 2009 年參與的一次公演中出道，及後在多部電視劇如《打架吧鬼神》、《舉重妖精金福珠》和《血隧》中所飾演的角色均給觀眾留下深刻印象。其後，在《金秘書為何那樣》中飾演幽默風趣的樸佑值一角得到大眾支持，正式打開知名度。
data.name: 姜基榮
